entity.summary: Turkey-operated centralized cryptocurrency exchange whose current official company profile identifies Bytedex Teknoloji A.Ş. and self-reports a 2020 founding.
entity.notes: The current official About Us page identifies Bytedex Teknoloji A.Ş. in İzmir, Türkiye and states that Byte Exchange was founded in 2020. Independent exchange profiles instead place establishment in 2021 under an Estonian entity, so HEI retains the earliest official self-reported year with medium confidence and uses Turkey for the current operating and corporate origin.

events.title: Byte Exchange founded
events.description: Byte Exchange's current official company profile states that the cryptocurrency exchange was founded in 2020.
events.notes: The official source establishes the year but not the exact day, so January 1 is used as a year-level placeholder. Independent profiles report 2021, which is retained as an uncertainty note.

evidence.title: Byte Exchange official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Byte Exchange identity and active service.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Byte Exchange
evidence.notes: Independent profile corroborates the exchange identity but reports a 2021 establishment and Estonian incorporation, preserved as an unresolved historical discrepancy.

evidence.title: Byte Exchange About Us
evidence.notes: Official company profile states that Byte Exchange was founded in 2020 and identifies the current Turkish operating company and İzmir address.
